name: reports-markdown-per-run
description: save_report() persists one markdown file per flow run under reports/, named <utc-ts>_<flow>_<run_id>.md so runs sort chronologically and correlate with the JSONL log by run_id — without it the specialist findings would exist only in-memory or transiently in stdout.
invariants: Specialist sections (Bug Analyst / SQL Performance) take precedence; the manager's own summary is written only when neither specialist was escalated to
contracts: Returns the path written; consumes exactly run_flow_once's report dict shape
